case_title: HOTUNG, PATRICIA vs. BREWSTER, GEORGE et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HOTUNG, PATRICIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BREWSTER, GEORGE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1177 CALIFORNIA STREET, #1132, LEASE FORFEITED

AMENDED REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $80.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 FILED BY PLAINTIFF HOTUNG, PATRICIA AS TO DEFENDANT BREWSTER, GEORGE
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS FILED BY PLAINTIFF HOTUNG, PATRICIA AS TO DEFENDANT BREWSTER, GEORGE
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT BREWSTER, GEORGE
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT BREWSTER, GEORGE

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HOTUNG, PATRICIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BREWSTER, GEORGE $15,916.75 RENT, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $15,996.75
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF HOTUNG, PATRICIA AS TO DEFENDANT BREWSTER, GEORGE DOES I-X SUMMONS ISSUED
